title: Find a specialist
lead: Factual signals, not our opinion. We don't divide doctors into trusted and the rest — we show what's documented: publications, guideline authorship, recent activity, and what other families report.

addDoctorCta.signIn: Sign in to recommend a doctor we're missing

diseaseFilter.placeholder: Filter by disease — name, gene, OMIM…

filters.seesPatientsTitle: Show doctors who see patients (experts reachable for a consult are always kept)
filters.parentOnlyTitle: Show only doctors recommended by parents
filters.workTypeGroupLabel: Type of work on the disease

empty.unknownDiseaseTail: to build the evidence base for this condition.
empty.noMatches: No specialists match the current filters. Try a different role, source, or distance filter.

provenance.lead: Profiles are built from public sources (PubMed, clinic websites) and family reports. A profile can be withdrawn at any time — write to

map.note: OpenStreetMap tiles · markers cluster when zoomed out. Click a pin to open the profile.

addDoctorModal.title: Recommend a doctor we're missing
addDoctorModal.sub: Tell us about a specialist who helped your family. We review every submission before it appears in the public directory.
addDoctorModal.submitError: Could not submit — please try again.
addDoctorModal.submittedBody: Thank you. A reviewer will check this submission before it appears in the public directory.
addDoctorModal.duplicateHint: This doctor may already be in our directory — the reviewer will merge duplicates so nothing is lost.
